meaning: n.三人执政,三头政治,三头统治,三人执政的政治
examples: The company is run jointly by a triumvirate of directors.
Jackson went on to mention a great Lakers triumvirate of the past.
Industry insiders said it is this triumvirate, and not Apple, that really holds the power in the relationship.
Who in the newly-formed triumvirate will do the crucial job of smoothing over customer concerns?
The triumvirate that has run Oracle for nearly a decade has done so successfully.
